description_long: This is a mid-sized, four-door sedan with a streamlined, boxy body typical of late 20th-century American cars. The exterior is painted in a light silver or white color, with black-tinted windows and subtle chrome accents along the side trim and around the windows. The front features a wide, rectangular grille with horizontal slats and rectangular headlights, while the rear has elongated red tail lights and a recessed license plate area. The wheels are simple, with a solid, utilitarian design and a light gray finish. The car's overall appearance suggests a practical, everyday vehicle designed for urban and suburban environments, with a focus on comfort and functionality. The interior is not visible, but it is likely composed of fabric or leather seats, plastic dashboard components, and glass windows.
description: A light silver four-door sedan with a boxy, practical design, black-tinted windows, and simple gray wheels. Features include a wide front grille, rectangular headlights, and elongated rear tail lights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide rectangular grille, rectangular headlights, and a smooth hood.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying four doors, black-tinted windows, and simple gray wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting elongated red tail lights, a recessed license plate area, and rear window slats.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing four doors, black-tinted windows, and simple gray wheels.
attribute_license_plate: rear only, white background, no readable text
attribute_wheel_design: solid light gray wheels with minimal visible detail, no distinct spokes
